title: Short title
doc_html:
PART IV-A.  LICENSING OF BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES PROVIDERS

§2151.  Short title

This Part may be cited as the "Behavioral Health Services Provider Licensing Law".

Acts 2013, No. 308, §1, eff. June 17, 2013.
